name: Full AI-generated answers prohibited
description: This course allows AI for editing support but not full answer generation.
educationalMessage: AI should support your own reasoning process rather than replace it.
suggestedAction: Rewrite core reasoning in your own words and use AI only for refinement.

name: AI contribution must stay below 40%
description: Assignments require original student authorship for the majority of content.
educationalMessage: Aim to treat AI as support rather than primary author.
suggestedAction: Reduce AI-generated content and explain your independent analysis.

name: Contribution description is required
description: Students must explain how AI was used in the assignment.
educationalMessage: Transparent reporting helps build good academic habits.
suggestedAction: Add a concise description of AI support and your own contribution.
